---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for ToolNest
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe. Example: "I always have to use a separate app to do X…"

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Which Tool Category Does This Affect?

- [ ] PDF Tools
- [ ] Image Tools
- [ ] Developer Tools
- [ ] Calculator Tools
- [ ] New Category (describe below)
- [ ] Platform Feature (not a specific tool)
